ab: Kay ciici arakay ku takebe tukulru, kay tikuray arakay ku dringay, pacengecenge pia kikay.
ch: A:老鼠應該要⽤⽯壓式陷阱抓，⽵雞應該要⽤套頸式陷阱抓，這樣才對。
en: It is correct to catch mice through rangay and catch bamboo partridges through qjiulang.

ab: Anika pangimia kikay, tapasamaliane li! Tharepane kakadrua ku makapualraalra.
ch: B:原來是這樣，我都搞錯了！難怪我都抓不到。
en: No wonder! I am mistaken and that’s why I cannot catch any of them.

ab: Naw bulruana musuane darepe kikay drusa ka satukutukulrane.
ch: A:那我再教你怎麼製作這兩種陷阱。
en: Then I will teach you how to set up these two traps.

ab: Mathariri! ala mathariri turamuru! lubiibilrili lrimaka pualranga ku labulabulay.
ch: B:好啊！太棒了！這樣我以後就會抓到獵物了。
en: Great! I will be able to catch the prey in the future.

ab: Maelrengenga ka ubulu angaangade, lu mua taseketane malra ku takaukaw, ila tangudalrane.
ch: A:田裡的草太長了，你去倉庫拿鐮刀，我們去田裡。
en: The grass in the fields is too tall. Go to the warehouse to take the sickle and let’s go to the fields.

ab: Piakay inu ku takaukaw?
ch: B:鐮刀放在哪裡?
en: Where are the sickles?

ab: Yakay ki thiili ki cepenge ki tapavaivaiyane ki taleke, sana mudaane su ki taseketane lri dreele su.
ch: A:在穀物乾燥簍的旁邊，你進去倉庫就會看到了。
en: It is next to the round basket. You will see it when you enter the warehouse.

ab: Drareela malra, madha kaduladula. Marangisi turamuru kwini takaukaw.
ch: A:小心拿，不要受傷。鐮刀很利。
en: Be careful and don’t get hurt. The sickle is very sharp.

ab: Madha dredreedre ki tukulru li!
ch: A:不要踩到我的陷阱!
en: Don’t step on my trap!

ab: Yataliinu ku tukulru su?
ch: B:你的陷阱在哪裡?
en: Where is your trap?

ab: Ku tukulru li yatailebe kavay ki angatu.
ch: A:我的陷阱在那棵樹的下面。
en: My trap is under that tree.

ab: Asu maka ngulringawana?
ch: B:你怎麼會記得?
en: How do you remember?

ab: Patuathingala ku pikay kikay, wathingala ku ka yatalikay inu ku tukulru li.
ch: A:我在這邊有做記號，我知道我的陷阱在哪裡。
en: I make a mark here, so I know where my trap is.

ab: Kikay rumuku, pikay nay ki babiabila ki drakerale si purumukane ki kaange.
ch: A:這是魚筌，我們放在溪邊捕魚。
en: This is a fish trap which we put beside the river for fishing.

ab: Kadrua ku rumuku nay kay, arakay nay ku salrakuikuilane tukaange.
ch: B:我們那邊沒有魚筌，我們都用釣竿抓魚。
en: We don’t have any fish traps there, so we catch fish with a fishing rod.

ab: Kai naku arakayyana ku salrakuikuilane, lubiibilrili bulruangaili midra?
ch: A:我沒有用過釣竿，你下次教我好嗎?
en: I have never used a fishing rod before, would you mind teaching me next time?

ab: Unu! Tataruelrenga lrakuili lubiibilrili.
ch: B:好啊!我們下次一起去釣魚。
en: Sure! Let’s go fishing together next time.

ab: Naw bulrunga musuane ku tadaredarepane ku rumuku ki kaange.
ch: A:那我下次教你做魚筌。
en: I will teach you how to make a fish trap next time.

ab: Ngiavevele kwini salrakuikuilane su, alaw muakailanenga ku kaange! kirimua malra bilibili.
ch: A:你的釣竿動了，是不是有魚上鉤了!你快拉起來。
en: Your fishing rod is moving. Isn’t the fish on the hook? Pull it up!

ab: Idrengerana, walukalukay turamuru kay varukuru. Naw sakay kay kikay bilibili.
ch: B:等等，船太晃了。我在這邊拉釣竿，你去那邊幫我拿網子來。
en: Wait, the ship is rolling heavily. I am here to pull the fishing rod and you should go there to grab me the net.

ab: Malra bilibili papia nakuane. Naw paralubu musuane bilibili.
ch: A:你把魚拉到我這邊。我幫妳拉起來。
en: Pull the fish to my side and I will help you pull it up.

ab: Ala mathariri turamuru! pangiaesay kaykameane, suaeteane kay rumuku ki kaange.
ch: A:太好了!今天大豐收，魚簍都裝滿了。
en: Great! It is a bumper crop today with full fish baskets.

ab: Ila takirarimu mubalriw si pangisabulu mitaane.
ch: B:我們快回去和大家分享。
en: Let’s go back immediately and share it with everyone.
